title: Update existing item by form

posts.author: Talco (tal cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I use Monday.com as a platform for documenting events and sends them to my clients via a WhatsApp bot connected to Monday.com via Webhook.
I want to add a feature where the customer can update is own input on a specific event (item).
My idea is to add a form that updates the client input cells.
To achive that i need to be able to automatically create a web link that will be added to a cell in each item that will lead to the form that updates that specific item.
I couldn’t find any previous information on the subject, does anyone have any ideas on how to approach the problem?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Talco,

You can use the Duplicates and Uniques app to update an item through a form.
Here is a demo of how.
If you need help with the app, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com
